case_title: JOSEF M DESIGN VS. JEANNE CUNICELLI

docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOSEF M. DESIGN. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JEANNE CUNICELLI. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED JUL-11-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CUNICELLI, JEANNE
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT CUNICELLI, JEANNE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JOSEF M DESIGN AS TO DEFENDANT CUNICELLI, JEANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
